$comment: Package graph for the Petrel generator. Overlays inherit core-owned namespace roots (package.core_namespace_roots) from the 'core' package's manifest so they extend, never redeclare, shared roots (e.g. blue). Read by run.py on every --manifest run; resolve_owned_namespace_roots consults only the 'core' entry. Paths are relative to the Petrel repo root (the generator's CWD).
